name: components/menubar
description: A persistent horizontal menu bar modeled after desktop application toolbars, containing multiple top-level menus that each open into dropdown panels. Supports nested sub-menus, checkbox items, radio groups, separators, and keyboard shortcuts. Built on Kobalte Menubar with full arrow-key traversal, typeahead search, and ARIA menubar semantics. Composed of Menubar, MenubarMenu, MenubarTrigger, MenubarContent, MenubarItem, and related sub-primitives.
useCases: Desktop-style web applications with File, Edit, View, and Help menu bars
Rich-text editors exposing formatting menus (Font, Paragraph, Styles, Insert)
IDE-like interfaces with Run, Debug, Tools, and Window management menus
Data-analysis tools with Data, Transform, Visualize, and Export top-level menus
usage: import { Menubar, MenubarMenu, MenubarTrigger, MenubarContent, MenubarItem, MenubarSeparator, MenubarCheckboxItem, MenubarRadioGroup, MenubarRadioItem, MenubarSub, MenubarSubTrigger, MenubarSubContent } from "shadcn-solid-components/components/menubar"
